entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Recreate the same solutions template page layout used for "Crypto Commerce":
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label, large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns, light grey background): left has label "THE RISK", a large bold stat, and a short paragraph; right has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question with a solid accent-colored button beneath.
5. Footer: centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: B2B DIGITAL ASSET SETTLEMENT
- H1: Bring conditional settlement to enterprise digital asset payments.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation enables enterprises to introduce conditional settlement and approval workflows into digital asset payments, without changing existing business processes.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: No approval, no release
- Risk paragraph: Enterprise digital asset payments often settle before internal approvals are complete. Wallet Nation keeps settlement conditional until agreed approval workflows are satisfied.
- Callout box text: APPROVAL WORKFLOWS
- Key benefit 1 — Workflow-aligned settlement: Payment release stays conditional until internal approval workflows are satisfied, matching existing enterprise processes.
- Key benefit 2 — No process changes: Wallet Nation integrates alongside current B2B payment processes — no re-platforming required.
- Key benefit 3 — Enterprise-grade control: Conditional settlement enforced through cryptographic credentials, not discretionary custodial control.
- CTA headline: Ready to bring conditional settlement to your enterprise payments?
- Button text: Talk to us
